## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1)

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 97.8%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 97.6%. With regard to the 2.2% of flights that did not adhere, 1.7% were early and 0.5% were late.

All airports showed adherence above 97%; and the five airports with traffic up to 15,000 IFR departures (Bremen, Münster/Osnabrück, Dresden, Saarbrücken and Erfurt) showed a 100% adherence.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
